docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT IAN MCNAMARA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 4, 2013 ON THE COURT'S MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT MCNAMARA, IAN HEARING SET FOR MAR-20-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT IAN MCNAMARA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APRIL 16, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 20, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT IAN MCNAMARA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. The Complaint states facts sufficient for a claim for common counts. Defendant shall respond to the complaint within 20 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: L. Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To Jun-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT IAN MCNAMARA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 4, 2013 on the Court's motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Apr-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT IAN MCNAMARA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the court's own motion to April 16, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 20, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the Plaintiff's opposition. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
